steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage states that Black residents had few formal banking options, and that Walker took action "to ______ this situation." The sentence that follows reveals the outcome: thousands of families gained access to home loans and savings. The blank must mean to correct or remedy an undesirable situation.

steps.title: Test each word against that meaning
steps.content:
• Choice A — prolong: means to extend something in time; Walker's actions ended the lack of services, not lengthened it. ✗
  • Choice B — rectify: means to correct or set right something undesirable — exactly what Walker did by chartering a bank that expanded access to financial services. ✓
  • Choice C — retain: means to keep or continue having something; Walker changed the situation rather than preserving it. ✗
  • Choice D — highlight: means to call attention to; Walker took concrete action beyond merely drawing attention to the problem. ✗
That matches Choice B — rectify.
